name: Dimension Master Data CSV Export
description: Export full dimension master data (incl. hierarchy & DAC attributes) to CSV via the SAC Data Export Service OData API.

providerId.description: Model technical name (e.g. PLAN_NEW_CAL) or GUID. Leave empty to enter in the widget.

dimensionId.description: Dimension ID to export (e.g. Region). Leave empty to enter in the widget.

isPublicDimension.description: If true, uses the sac_public_dimensions endpoint (no model needed).

includeHierarchy.description: If true, uses the {DimName}MasterWithHierarchy endpoint to include parent-child hierarchy columns.

selectColumns.description: Comma-separated columns to include ($select). Empty = all columns.

filenamePrefix.description: Prefix for the downloaded CSV filename.
